space_force_cyber_defense_cyber_threat_r.name: Cyber Threat Response
space_force_cyber_defense_cyber_threat_r.description: Mission Defense Team battle drills for live incidents.

cards.title: MDT Battle Drill 0
cards.description: Practice the initial triage call: confirm indicators, halt spread, and notify C3 with mission impact statements per USSF MDT CONOPS. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Capture who/what/when
Stabilize critical services
Notify battle staff
cards.summaryText: The first five minutes set tempo—train until the script is reflex.

cards.title: Kill Chain Mapping
cards.description: Rapidly map observed indicators onto the Lockheed Martin kill chain to focus countermeasures. Ref: AFI 17-102.
bulletpoints: Identify current phase
Select counter actions
Log supporting evidence
cards.summaryText: Translate messy logs into a clear adversary kill chain within minutes.

cards.title: Forensic Imaging SOP
cards.description: Rehearse cold imaging of mission servers with write blockers, hashing, and chain-of-custody docs per AFMAN 71-102. Ref: AFI 71-101 V1.
bulletpoints: Capture forensic image
Generate SHA-256 hash
Document custody
cards.summaryText: Evidence only holds up if Guardians preserve it perfectly.

cards.title: Containment Decision Tree
cards.description: Walk through isolation options (interface shutdown, ACL, hypervisor snapshot) while weighing mission downtime. Ref: USCYBERCOM JFHQ-DODIN TTPs.
bulletpoints: Define containment tiers
Estimate mission impact
Gain commander approval
cards.summaryText: Contain smart—protect the mission even while fighting malware.

cards.title: Hunt Hypothesis Lab
cards.description: Formulate and test hypotheses using threat intel, MITRE ATT&CK, and local telemetry to find footholds. Ref: AFMAN 17-1203.
bulletpoints: State adversary goal
List telemetry sources
Document results
cards.summaryText: Winning hunts start with disciplined hypotheses and end with evidence.

cards.title: Incident Communications
cards.description: Draft SITREP inputs that address what happened, risk to mission, and required support in Guardian Downlink formats. Ref: AFMAN 10-417.
bulletpoints: Summarize facts
Describe mission impact
List support needed
cards.summaryText: Incident comms build trust—make them crisp and doctrinal.

cards.title: Eradication & Recovery Runbook
cards.description: Sequence eradication steps, validation tests, and phased restoration for mission systems. Ref: NIST SP 800-61r2.
bulletpoints: List eradication tasks
Define validation checks
Plan phased restore
cards.summaryText: When recovery is scripted, commanders say yes faster.

cards.title: Threat Intel Fusion
cards.description: Fuse DIA, NSA, and commercial intel extracts with local indicators to update adversary TTP profiles. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Correlate intel reports
Update adversary profile
Share with JADC2 nodes
cards.summaryText: Great responders know their adversary's next move before it lands.

cards.title: ICS Incident Timeline
cards.description: Build a precise OT incident timeline by combining historian logs, PLC captures, and facility data. Ref: NIST SP 800-82.
bulletpoints: Collect OT-specific logs
Note physical impacts
Sync time sources
cards.summaryText: Space ground segments include OT—treat it as part of the battle space.

cards.title: After-Action & Lessons
cards.description: Conduct hotwash using AFMAN 90-1601 templates to lock in lessons, assign owners, and update TTPs. Ref: AFDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Capture root cause
Assign improvement tasks
Update playbooks
cards.summaryText: Every incident should make the next response faster.

cards.title: Evidence Retention Policy
cards.description: Review classification guides, retention timelines, and legal holds so data is preserved correctly. Ref: AFMAN 51-203.
bulletpoints: Check retention clocks
Classify evidence
Coordinate with JA
cards.summaryText: Evidence mishandled equals cases lost—guard it.

cards.title: JADC2 Reporting Inject
cards.description: Practice packaging cyber incident effects for JADC2 nodes so air, land, and maritime partners understand the impact. Ref: ABMS Playbook.
bulletpoints: Translate to joint effects
Provide recommended COAs
Note dependencies
cards.summaryText: Cyber ops must plug cleanly into the joint kill chain—train it now.

space_force_cyber_defense_network_securi.name: Network Security
space_force_cyber_defense_network_securi.description: Mission Defense Team hardening reps for space weapon system networks.

cards.title: RMF Control Burn-Down
cards.description: Prioritize POA&M items by mapping each open control to mission impact, weapon system baseline, and AFI 17-101 suspense. Ref: DoDI 8510.01.
bulletpoints: Rank controls by CAT
Tie fixes to mission threads
Brief authorizing official
cards.summaryText: RMF is a combat support task when it drives mission availability.

cards.title: STIG Automation Rehearsal
cards.description: Run security content automation protocol (SCAP) scans, interpret deltas, and document compensating controls for space ground segments. Ref: AFMAN 17-1301.
bulletpoints: Execute latest SCAP content
Review deltas vs. baseline
Log mitigations in POA&M
cards.summaryText: STIGs only matter if Guardians can execute and explain them fast.

cards.title: Boundary Protection Stack
cards.description: Validate firewall ACLs, IPS signatures, and cross-domain guard rules against the current Space Tasking Order. Ref: AFI 17-206.
bulletpoints: Review ACL change log
Confirm IPS signature set
Test guard releasability
cards.summaryText: A layered boundary is the first MDT talking point every shift.

cards.title: Mission Thread Mapping
cards.description: Trace critical cyber terrain from antenna to data endpoint so defenders know exactly where to instrument sensors. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Diagram mission services
Highlight choke points
Align sensors to terrain
cards.summaryText: If you can't draw the mission thread, you can't defend it.

cards.title: Privileged Access Review
cards.description: Audit admin accounts, MFA logs, and service credentials per AFMAN 17-1302-O to prevent lateral movement. Ref: AFI 17-701.
bulletpoints: List admin users & roles
Verify MFA artifacts
Rotate shared creds
cards.summaryText: Privileged access sprawl kills Zero-Trust efforts—keep it tight.

cards.title: Patch Management Warboard
cards.description: Compare vendor bulletins, IAVMs, and waiver statuses to plan patch installs without breaking mission availability. Ref: CJCSM 6510.01B.
bulletpoints: Rank patches by severity
Identify maintenance windows
Capture regression tests
cards.summaryText: Patch timelines must match launch manifests and contact windows.

cards.title: Logging & SIEM Health Check
cards.description: Confirm syslog coverage, time sync, and correlation rules so hunt teams have clean data. Ref: DoDI 8500.01.
bulletpoints: Verify NTP sources
Test log forwarding
Review correlation gaps
cards.summaryText: Bad logs equal blind MDTs—keep the data trustworthy.

cards.title: Supply Chain Assurance
cards.description: Inspect HBSS/ESS baselines, firmware provenance, and SBOM records per DoDI 5200.44 to mitigate tampered hardware. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Review SBOM updates
Check signed firmware
Document vendor attestations
cards.summaryText: Space systems ride unique supply chains; verify every component.

cards.title: SCIF Cross-Domain Safeguards
cards.description: Validate Cross Domain Solution guard queues, releasability rules, and auditing for ISR data flows. Ref: CNSSI 1253.
bulletpoints: Test guard transfer
Review release justifications
Archive guard audit logs
cards.summaryText: Cross-domain errors can halt joint ops—treat them like mission critical gear.

cards.title: OT Segmentation Drill
cards.description: Ensure antenna pedestals, UPS, and HVAC controls stay segmented with correctly configured ACLs and monitoring. Ref: DoDI 8500.01.
bulletpoints: Label OT VLANs
Check ACL enforcement
Alert on lateral moves
cards.summaryText: Operational tech is mission equipment; defend it like avionics.

cards.title: Encryption Posture Review
cards.description: Verify TLS versions, IPsec tunnels, and crypto device key loads align with CNSSP-15 guidance. Ref: AFI 17-130.
bulletpoints: Check cipher suites
Validate key rotation
Document tunneling paths
cards.summaryText: Crypto currency isn't financial—it's mission assurance.

cards.title: Configuration Baseline Audit
cards.description: Compare current configs to the secure baseline repository, documenting deviations with mission risk rationale. Ref: AFMAN 63-119.
bulletpoints: Export running configs
Diff vs. gold image
Log authorized deviations
cards.summaryText: Config drift equals vulnerability debt—pay it down daily.

space_force_cyber_defense_zero_trust.name: Zero-Trust Integration
space_force_cyber_defense_zero_trust.description: Applying the DoD Zero Trust Strategy to space mission systems.

cards.title: Seven Pillar Assessment
cards.description: Score each Zero Trust pillar (user, device, network, app, data, visibility, automation) for your weapon system and brief deficits. Ref: DoD ZT Strategy 2022.
bulletpoints: Rate maturity 1-5
Tie gap to mission
Assign owner
cards.summaryText: Know exactly where your Zero Trust program is fragile before audits do.

cards.title: Identity Assurance Drill
cards.description: Test CAC plus derived credential issuance, step-up auth, and role-based claims for ops consoles. Ref: DoDI 8520.02.
bulletpoints: Verify RBAC claims
Exercise step-up auth
Log ID assurance gaps
cards.summaryText: Identity is the new perimeter—treat it that way daily.

cards.title: Device Posture Enforcement
cards.description: Validate endpoint management baselines (HAFNIUM, CrowdStrike) before granting access via policy engines. Ref: DoDI 8500.01.
bulletpoints: Check compliance posture
Enforce deny-by-default
Report non-compliant nodes
cards.summaryText: If the device fails posture checks, it never touches the mission net.

cards.title: Micro-Segment Design
cards.description: Lay out policy decision/enforcement points that isolate payload control planes from support services. Ref: DoD ZT Reference Architecture.
bulletpoints: Tag flows by mission
Deploy PDP/PEP pairs
Simulate east-west blocks
cards.summaryText: Micro-segmentation keeps attackers from pivoting to the payload.

cards.title: Policy Automation Scripts
cards.description: Build IaC playbooks that push Zero Trust policies consistently across environments. Ref: AF DevSecOps Reference Design.
bulletpoints: Parameterize policies
Test in staging
Version-control scripts
cards.summaryText: Infrastructure as code keeps Zero Trust configs honest.

cards.title: Data Tagging & ABAC
cards.description: Apply attribute-based access control tags (mission, coalition, classification) to telemetry feeds. Ref: CNSSI 1253.
bulletpoints: Define tag schema
Apply to data lake
Test enforcement
cards.summaryText: Data tagging ensures only the right Guardians see sensitive telemetry.

cards.title: Continuous Diagnostics Loop
cards.description: Instrument telemetry for user behavior analytics, UEBA thresholds, and SOAR triggers. Ref: DHS CDM Program Guidance.
bulletpoints: Stream telemetry
Train UEBA baselines
Tie alerts to SOAR
cards.summaryText: Continuous diagnostics close the loop between sensing and acting.

cards.title: Mission App Refactoring
cards.description: Assess legacy mission apps for modern auth, APIs, and logging to determine Zero Trust readiness. Ref: Platform One Playbook.
bulletpoints: Inventory dependencies
Add OIDC integration
Enable structured logging
cards.summaryText: Modernize apps so they can live inside a policy-driven fabric.

cards.title: Mission Risk Scoring
cards.description: Quantify Zero Trust control health vs. mission impact using simple scoring models presented to commanders. Ref: AFDP 1-1 Risk Management.
bulletpoints: Assign weights by mission
Score each control
Brief risk in COP
cards.summaryText: Commanders fund what they understand—make Zero Trust risk real.

cards.title: Coalition Access Guardrails
cards.description: Design per-partner policies, tagging, and monitoring so coalition Guardians get only the data they need. Ref: Combined Space Ops Vision.
bulletpoints: Define partner attributes
Apply least privilege
Monitor sharing events
cards.summaryText: Enable coalitions without creating backdoors in the network.

cards.title: Legacy System Compensations
cards.description: Document compensating controls when heritage systems can't meet Zero Trust requirements yet. Ref: DoDI 8510.01.
bulletpoints: List unsupported features
Add monitoring overlays
Plan modernization path
cards.summaryText: Zero Trust is a journey—capture reality without excusing risk.

cards.title: Continuous Authorization Brief
cards.description: Build concise briefings showing metrics, automation coverage, and remediation velocity for cATO sponsors. Ref: DoD CIO cATO Memo 2022.
bulletpoints: Highlight key metrics
Show automation wins
State next sprint goals
cards.summaryText: cATO confidence comes from transparent Zero Trust telemetry.

space_force_fleet_coordination_protocols.name: Formation Link Management Drills
space_force_fleet_coordination_protocols.description: C2 walkthroughs that keep constellation formations coherent when dozens of hulls share contested spectrum.

cards.title: Spectrum Allocation Rehearsal
cards.description: Re-plan primary, alternate, contingency, and emergency (PACE) link allocations for a 30-ship formation when coalition partners join mid-mission.
bulletpoints: Validate guard channel monitoring
Assign coalition crypto rotation windows
Update spectrum manager with new load
cards.summaryText: PACE refreshes keep formations from stepping on each other's beams when the stack grows fast.

cards.title: Link Budget Hot-Wash
cards.description: Audit RF link budgets after solar weather advisories to confirm each hull still carries 3 dB margin at the edge of formation geometry.
bulletpoints: Pull latest solar flux reports
Recompute Eb/No for long-hop relays
Issue reroute order if margins collapse
cards.summaryText: Small link budget drifts compound across a fleet; catch them before guidance complains.

cards.title: Mission Thread Chokepoint Drill
cards.description: Walk the entire mission thread to expose single points of failure in relay sequencing and design alternate hops in under 15 minutes.
bulletpoints: Trace data path from sensor to shooter
Flag nodes without hot spares
Document swap orders in C2 log
cards.summaryText: Fleet commanders rehearse thread resiliency so an isolated jammer never bricks targeting.

cards.title: Cross-Delta ROE Sync
cards.description: Align comms rules of engagement and reporting priorities when multiple Deltas cohabit the same battlespace.
bulletpoints: Publish time hacks for SITREP windows
Clarify who controls shared relays
Confirm escalation triggers
cards.summaryText: Shared formations collapse when ROE differs by Delta; sync it daily.

cards.title: Dynamic Routing Sandbox
cards.description: Use the formation simulator to reroute high-priority traffic through three alternate paths within five minutes of a link loss.
bulletpoints: Trigger automated route proposals
Validate latency budgets
Push new tables to watch floor
cards.summaryText: Commanders that practice dynamic routing never wait on software to save their SATCOM mesh.

cards.title: Collision/Comms Deconfliction
cards.description: Overlay ephemeris and link schedules to ensure proximity operations never violate pointing constraints or fratricide envelopes.
bulletpoints: Cross-check maneuver plans with COMSEC windows
Identify simultaneous dwell conflicts
Coordinate with safety officer for waivers
cards.summaryText: Formation safety is half orbital math, half comms choreography—treat both as one.

space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_in.name: Intel Fusion Cell Ops
space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_in.description: Battle rhythms, analytic standards, and dissemination drills for squadron and Delta fusion cells supporting JADC2.

cards.title: Fusion Battle Rhythm Design
cards.description: Lay out a 24-hour timeline that syncs collection, PED, targeting boards, and commander updates into a repeatable fusion cadence. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: List decision windows
Align ISR feeds + PED
Publish handoffs
cards.summaryText: A disciplined fusion battle rhythm keeps every intel node pointed at the same decision.

cards.title: All-Source Worksheet Build
cards.description: Construct a standard all-source worksheet capturing SIGINT, GEOINT, OSINT, and cyber indicators tied to each threat object. Ref: AFI 14-133.
bulletpoints: Define essential fields
Map INT ownership
Embed confidence scale
cards.summaryText: Worksheets are the fusion cell's single source of truth—build them right.

cards.title: Data Conditioning Drill
cards.description: Rehearse extracting, cleaning, and normalizing sensor outputs (TLEs, RF hits, telemetry) so analytics scripts ingest without delay. Ref: JADC2 Data Reference Architecture.
bulletpoints: Standardize formats
Record QC checks
Automate ingest
cards.summaryText: Dirty data kills fusion timelines—condition it before the fight.

cards.title: Multi-INT Correlation Board
cards.description: Lead a board that walks commanders through each INT and the fused narrative with confidence statements and COAs. Ref: AFMAN 14-202.
bulletpoints: Sequence INT updates
Highlight conflicts
State fused COA
cards.summaryText: Correlation boards translate raw INTs into commander-ready narratives.

cards.title: JIPTL Support Reps
cards.description: Practice stuffing intel justifications, desired effects, and weaponeering notes into the Joint Integrated Prioritized Target List package. Ref: AFI 13-1AOCV3.
bulletpoints: Tie intel to target
Document CDE
Log recommended effect
cards.summaryText: Targeting boards move faster when intel inputs are precise and defensible.

cards.title: JADC2 API Familiarization
cards.description: Hands-on reps with ABMS/JADC2 data APIs to understand schema, authentication, and latency impacts. Ref: ABMS Dev Sec Ops Guide.
bulletpoints: Query live endpoint
Measure latency
Document failover
cards.summaryText: Fusion cells should treat APIs like any other sensor—they need constant verification.

cards.title: Analytic Tradecraft Review
cards.description: Apply ICD 203 analytic tradecraft standards to recent products, capturing sourced statements, assumptions, and alternatives.
bulletpoints: Audit sourcing
List key assumptions
Document alternative hypotheses
cards.summaryText: Tradecraft discipline keeps fusion products credible under scrutiny.

cards.title: Indications & Warnings Matrix
cards.description: Populate an I&W matrix that links indicators, thresholds, and associated collection plans for space threats. Ref: AFMAN 14-304.
bulletpoints: Select indicators
Assign thresholds
Pre-brief actions
cards.summaryText: Warning intel should specify action the moment an indicator trips.

cards.title: Coalition Releasability Drill
cards.description: Walk through derivative classification and foreign disclosure steps before providing fused products to CSpO partners. Ref: DoDM 5200.01.
bulletpoints: Tag portions
Consult disclosure officer
Record release approval
cards.summaryText: Fast releasability decisions keep coalition partners in the fight.

cards.title: Fusion Cell Contingency SOP
cards.description: Draft step-by-step SOPs for loss of power, comms, or toolsets so fusion continues under degraded ops. Ref: AFMAN 10-100.
bulletpoints: Identify single points
Pre-stage backups
Assign manual roles
cards.summaryText: Contingency SOPs turn chaos into a checklist when systems fail.

cards.title: Hotwash Capture
cards.description: After each major event, collect metrics, friction points, and opportunities to update TTPs. Ref: AFI 90-1601.
bulletpoints: Gather metrics
Assign action officers
Publish TTP updates
cards.summaryText: Every fusion event should produce lessons learned within 24 hours.

cards.title: Intel-to-Sto Handoff
cards.description: Package fused assessments into the Space Tasking Order with clear tasks, risk, and follow-up collections. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: State supported effect
List required tasks
Assign re-attack criteria
cards.summaryText: Fusion work only matters when it drives the next STO tasking.

space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_jo.name: Joint Multi-Domain Ops
space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_jo.description: Preparing space intel teams to plug into JADC2 and coalition targeting.

cards.title: JADC2 Data Thread Mapping
cards.description: Trace how a space sensor cue flows into ABMS, CJADC2, and fires cells so latency and format issues are known. Ref: CJCS JADC2 Strategy 2022.
bulletpoints: Map each node
Measure latency
Identify format gaps
cards.summaryText: If you can't map the data thread, you can't fix it.

cards.title: Joint Targeting Input
cards.description: Translate space effects into JAAT (Joint Air Attack Team) target folders with desired effect, time-on-target, and risk. Ref: JP 3-60.
bulletpoints: Describe desired effect
Note timing constraints
State risk & mitigation
cards.summaryText: Make space effects readable to every targeting board.

cards.title: Space Support Requests
cards.description: Rehearse how air/land components submit and track SSRs, ensuring fulfillment or reattack recommendations. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Review SSR form
Assign fulfillment timeline
Provide feedback loop
cards.summaryText: SSR discipline keeps expectations aligned across the joint team.

cards.title: Joint Space Tasking Order Read-In
cards.description: Break down JSTO sections, coordination measures, and net synchronization before daily JTCB. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Summarize STO tasks
Highlight constraints
Connect to other domains
cards.summaryText: Space pros must fluently brief JSTO relevance to non-space leaders.

cards.title: Coalition Release Matrix
cards.description: Review releasability rules for partners (Five Eyes, NATO) and tag products accordingly. Ref: AFTTP 3-1.Space.
bulletpoints: Identify partner caveats
Tag each product
Record release authority
cards.summaryText: Share boldly, but always inside classification guardrails.

cards.title: Multi-Domain Effects Matrix
cards.description: Link space actions to cyber, air, land, and maritime effects for the commander’s decision matrix. Ref: JP 3-0.
bulletpoints: List space options
Map supported domains
State dependencies
cards.summaryText: Show commanders how a space move ripples across the fight.

cards.title: Cross-Component Intelligence Cueing
cards.description: Plan how intel from other domains triggers SDA collection and vice versa. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Define cue thresholds
Identify liaison points
Document response times
cards.summaryText: Cueing should feel automatic between components.

cards.title: Joint COP Update
cards.description: Practice updating the Joint Common Operating Picture with space tracks, effects, and constraints in plain language. Ref: JP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Use approved symbology
Highlight impacts
Update in near-real time
cards.summaryText: If the COP is wrong, the fight is wrong—feed it reliable space data.

cards.title: Operational Assessment Cues
cards.description: Define Measures of Performance/Effectiveness for space contributions to joint objectives. Ref: CJCSI 3162.02D.
bulletpoints: Tie MOPs to tasks
Tie MOEs to objectives
Collect supporting data
cards.summaryText: Space Guardians must prove effects with measurable data.

cards.title: Battle Damage Assessment Template
cards.description: Provide BDA for space-enabled effects with accuracy, timeliness, and follow-on recommendations. Ref: JP 3-60.
bulletpoints: Assess physical/system effects
Note functional changes
Recommend follow-up
cards.summaryText: BDA closes the loop; space intel must deliver it like any other domain.

cards.title: Dynamic Targeting Inject
cards.description: Walk through F2T2EA (find, fix, track, target, engage, assess) with a space-enabled target. Ref: JP 3-60.
bulletpoints: Assign roles per phase
Monitor kill chain status
Capture assessment data
cards.summaryText: Space elements must be fluent in dynamic targeting lexicon.

cards.title: Joint Planning Group Integration
cards.description: Prepare inputs for the JPG: assumptions, facts, limitations, and space unique considerations. Ref: JP 5-0.
bulletpoints: List critical assumptions
State space constraints
Offer supporting forces
cards.summaryText: Be the Guardian who speaks joint planning fluently.

space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_sp.name: Space ISR
space_force_intelligence_and_analysis_sp.description: Collection, processing, and PED drills for space intelligence flights.

cards.title: Collection Requirement Trace
cards.description: Translate Priority Intelligence Requirements into specific sensor taskings, including justification and expected phenomenology. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Restate PIR in plain terms
Match to sensor capability
Submit RFI with timeline
cards.summaryText: Great ISR flights tie PIRs to actual sensor runs Guardians can deliver.

cards.title: PED Battle Rhythm
cards.description: Design Processing, Exploitation, and Dissemination flows with staffing, timelines, and cross-cues across INTs. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Chart PED pipeline
Assign analyst roles
Define dissemination format
cards.summaryText: PED discipline keeps commanders supplied with timely intel.

cards.title: Orbit Activity Baseline
cards.description: Characterize normal adversary satellite patterns (mean motion, maneuvers, emissions) to detect anomalies quickly. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Summarize daily pattern
Flag historical maneuvers
Document signature sets
cards.summaryText: Baselines let you see the threat when it deviates by centimeters.

cards.title: SIGINT-TLE Correlation
cards.description: Fuse SIGINT intercept windows with TLE-driven pointing to attribute emitters. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Align intercept time/space
Map to potential objects
Assign confidence rating
cards.summaryText: Cross-domain fusion is the hallmark of modern ISR.

cards.title: Intelligence Preparation for the Space Environment
cards.description: Execute the IPSE model: define the OE, describe effects, evaluate threats, determine threat COAs. Ref: AFDP 2-0 annex.
bulletpoints: Outline space OE
Assess environment impacts
List adversary COAs
cards.summaryText: Treat space like any battlefield by preparing it intel-style.

cards.title: ISR Synchronization Matrix
cards.description: Create a time-phased matrix aligning collection, PED, and supported commander decisions. Ref: AFI 14-153.
bulletpoints: List decision points
Align sensors & PED
Share with STO cell
cards.summaryText: Synchronization keeps every ISR element rowing together.

cards.title: Allied ISR Integration
cards.description: Map releasability, classification, and coalition PED nodes to include partner data. Ref: Combined Space Ops Vision.
bulletpoints: Tag releasable products
Identify partner PED nodes
Establish feedback loops
cards.summaryText: Coalition ISR is a force multiplier when planned deliberately.

cards.title: Space Threat Library Update
cards.description: Refresh threat models with new telemetry, cyber indicators, and imagery cues each quarter. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Add latest intel takes
Retire obsolete data
Publish change log
cards.summaryText: A stale threat library is worse than none—keep it alive.

cards.title: Warning Intelligence Drill
cards.description: Practice building warning intelligence reports with indicators, thresholds, and recommended responses. Ref: AFMAN 14-304.
bulletpoints: Define indicator
Set trigger value
State commander action
cards.summaryText: Warning intel should tell commanders what to do, not just what happened.

cards.title: Collection Deck Quality Check
cards.description: Audit the production plan for duplicates, stale requirements, and sensor overload. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Purge filled requirements
Balance sensor load
Validate priority order
cards.summaryText: Keep the collection deck lean so sensors chase what matters most.

cards.title: Target System Analysis
cards.description: Break down adversary space systems (ground, link, space) to inform targeting nominations. Ref: AFMAN 14-202.
bulletpoints: Identify nodes
Assess vulnerabilities
Tie to desired effects
cards.summaryText: Targeting starts with rigorous system analysis across every layer.

cards.title: ISR to STO Handover
cards.description: Package ISR findings for the Space Tasking Order with clear confidence levels and recommended taskings. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Summarize finding
State confidence
Recommend STO action
cards.summaryText: Intel only wins when it drives tasking—make the link explicit.

space_force_joint_space_operations_joint.name: Joint C2 Rehearsal Blocks
space_force_joint_space_operations_joint.description: ATO/ACO walk-throughs that keep Guardians synced with air, cyber, and maritime battle rhythms before execution.

cards.title: ATO Thread Mapping
cards.description: Trace every space effect supporting the current Air Tasking Order and capture timing dependencies with air assets.
bulletpoints: Identify space support requests by line
Mark latest acceptable delivery times
Record owning unit for each effect
cards.summaryText: ATO threads stay executable only when space injects are mapped and owned.

cards.title: ACO Link Validation
cards.description: Confirm airspace control order corridors align with current SATCOM pointing and JTIDS link roles.
bulletpoints: Crosswalk ACO geometry with link budgets
Assign coalition tracks to Guardians
Document conflicts for CSpOC arbitration
cards.summaryText: Airspace plans fail fast if link assignments lag; double-check them daily.

cards.title: Battle Rhythm Synchronization
cards.description: Align JFACC, JFMCC, and SPOC battle rhythms so the JSpOC floor never misses a decision brief.
bulletpoints: Capture decision boards with times
List required USSF feeds
Publish Guardian attendance matrix
cards.summaryText: Joint integration is mostly schedule discipline—treat it like any other comms plan.

cards.title: Fires Cell Fusion Rehearsal
cards.description: Practice injecting SDA updates and orbital windows into the joint fires battle drill under five minutes.
bulletpoints: Pull latest SDA custody list
Translate to targetable windows
Deliver updates in the fires format
cards.summaryText: Space effects help the fires cell only if they arrive in time and in language the cell trusts.

cards.title: Coalition Release Checklist
cards.description: Rehearse rapid releasability decisions for sharing ISR and SDA feeds with allied nodes.
bulletpoints: Pre-approve releasable products
List caveats by partner
Practice redact-and-send workflow
cards.summaryText: Coalitions stay lethal when releasability is rehearsed, not improvised.

cards.title: Joint After-Action Capture
cards.description: Immediately log Guardian-specific lessons during joint rehearsals and publish them to the AOC knowledge base.
bulletpoints: Assign recorder for each event
Document friction points within 30 min
Push updates to SPOC portal
cards.summaryText: Joint partners reuse Guardian lessons only if you capture them while the drill is fresh.

space_force_leadership_and_professionali.name: Emotional Intelligence
space_force_leadership_and_professionali.description: Guardian Ideal-aligned EQ drills for flight commanders and crew leads.

cards.title: Guardian Ideal Values Check-In
cards.description: Lead a weekly huddle where each teammate shares how they lived Character, Connection, Commitment, and Courage. Ref: Guardian Ideal (2021).
bulletpoints: Model vulnerability first
Celebrate specific behaviors
Capture growth commitments
cards.summaryText: Values stick when leaders ask about them out loud.

cards.title: Emotion Labeling Rehearsal
cards.description: Practice describing emotions with precision before tough conversations so intent stays clear. Ref: OTS Leadership Curriculum.
bulletpoints: Use feelings not judgments
Tie emotion to impact
Plan empathy statements
cards.summaryText: Clear labels reduce defensiveness in feedback moments.

cards.title: Crucial Conversation Prep
cards.description: Use the USAF Crucial Conversations model (start with heart, master my stories, state path) before counseling sessions. Ref: OTS Leadership Guide.
bulletpoints: Clarify desired outcome
Separate facts vs stories
Plan mutual purpose
cards.summaryText: Deliberate prep keeps hard talks productive instead of explosive.

cards.title: 360° Listening Drill
cards.description: Host five-minute listening rotations, paraphrasing teammate inputs without rebuttal to strengthen trust. Ref: Guardian Resilience Program.
bulletpoints: Set timer & rotate
Paraphrase before speaking
Capture action items
cards.summaryText: Listening muscles need reps just like technical skills.

cards.title: Stress Signal Inventory
cards.description: List personal stress tells (tone, posture, habits) and share with your deputy so they can help you course-correct. Ref: Guardian Ideal Appendix A.
bulletpoints: Identify physical cues
Assign relief actions
Invite feedback
cards.summaryText: Leaders who name their stress cues catch them sooner.

cards.title: Assume Positive Intent Drill
cards.description: Before replying to an email/text, rewrite the sender's message assuming positive intent to reduce reactive tone. Ref: Guardian Leadership Playbook.
bulletpoints: Pause before typing
Rewrite intent
Respond with curiosity
cards.summaryText: Guardians move faster when miscommunications stay small.

cards.title: Recognition Cadence Plan
cards.description: Schedule consistent micro-recognition (handwritten notes, shoutouts) tied to Guardian Ideal behaviors. Ref: USAF Profession of Arms Center guidance.
bulletpoints: Pick cadence (daily/weekly)
Tie praise to value
Vary delivery methods
cards.summaryText: Recognition feeds morale when it is specific and steady.

cards.title: Conflict Temperature Gauge
cards.description: Teach teams to rate disagreement heat (green/yellow/red) so they know when to pause. Ref: Guardian Resilience Training.
bulletpoints: Define color criteria
Build pause protocol
Debrief after reset
cards.summaryText: Shared language keeps debates from devolving into fights.

cards.title: Empathy Mapping
cards.description: Use the empathy map (says, thinks, does, feels) before mission changes that affect crews. Ref: Guardian Ideal toolkit.
bulletpoints: Capture each quadrant
Plan tailored messaging
Address real fears
cards.summaryText: Empathy is a planning tool, not a buzzword.

cards.title: Psychological Safety Retro
cards.description: Run retros using OTS's four-question template: what worked, what lacked clarity, what risks felt safe, what to improve. Ref: OTS Instruction 36-2011.
bulletpoints: Ask all four questions
Listen without rebuttal
Publish commitments
cards.summaryText: Psych safety requires deliberate rituals, not slogans.

cards.title: Mentorship Map
cards.description: Chart who mentors you and whom you mentor, ensuring diversity of perspective per Guardian Ideal guidance. Ref: Guardian Ideal.
bulletpoints: List mentors by skill
Identify mentee needs
Schedule check-ins
cards.summaryText: Healthy mentorship ecosystems prevent leader burnout.

cards.title: Resilience Resource Drill
cards.description: Practice introducing chaplain, mental health, True North, and Military & Family Life resources so stigma stays low. Ref: Guardian Resilience Framework.
bulletpoints: Know contact info
Share personal story
Normalize proactive use
cards.summaryText: Leaders who share resources early make it easier for Guardians to seek help.

space_force_leadership_and_professionali.name: Ethical Decision-Making
space_force_leadership_and_professionali.description: Just Culture, LOAC, and professional conduct drills for Guardian leaders.

cards.title: Just Culture Triage
cards.description: Apply the USAF Just Culture decision tree (human error, at-risk, reckless) to a recent console error. Ref: AFI 90-301.
bulletpoints: Collect facts only
Classify behavior type
Select accountability action
cards.summaryText: Just Culture keeps learning high and fear low when used weekly.

cards.title: LOAC in Space Vignette
cards.description: War-game a scenario applying Law of Armed Conflict principles (military necessity, proportionality, distinction) to a space control COA. Ref: DoDD 2311.01E.
bulletpoints: Identify LOAC principle
Stress-test collateral risk
Record legal counsel input
cards.summaryText: Space operations still follow LOAC—practice the translation.

cards.title: Ethical Risk Matrix
cards.description: Overlay mission risk and ethical risk on a 2x2 matrix before approving expedited actions. Ref: AFDP 1-1 Risk Management.
bulletpoints: Rate mission impact
Rate ethical exposure
Select mitigations
cards.summaryText: Seeing ethical risk visually prevents rash approvals.

cards.title: Whistleblower Path Review
cards.description: Brief your team on protected communication channels and reprisal protections outlined in DoDI 7050.01. Ref: DoDI 7050.01.
bulletpoints: List reporting avenues
State reprisal penalties
Encourage early reporting
cards.summaryText: Guardians speak up faster when they know they're protected.

cards.title: Information Classification Drill
cards.description: Have crews classify sample mission data using classification guides to avoid over/under-marking. Ref: DoDM 5200.01 Vol 2.
bulletpoints: Read guide excerpt
Apply markings
Discuss rationale
cards.summaryText: Accurate markings protect sources without slowing the fight.

cards.title: Professional Boundaries Scenario
cards.description: Role-play handling fraternization or misuse of government resources using AFI 1-1 standards. Ref: AFI 1-1.
bulletpoints: State standard
Outline corrective steps
Document follow-up
cards.summaryText: Leaders must intervene early and consistently on conduct issues.

cards.title: Moral Courage Reflection
cards.description: Write about a time you delayed voicing concern and plan how you'd respond aligned with the Guardian Creed. Ref: Guardian Ideal.
bulletpoints: Describe situation
Identify barrier
Commit to next step
cards.summaryText: Reflection builds the courage to speak up next time.

cards.title: Ethics Advisory Council
cards.description: Stand up a quarterly mini-council with legal, chaplain, and senior enlisted advisors to review upcoming dilemmas. Ref: Commander’s Inspection Program.
bulletpoints: Invite multidisciplinary team
Share dilemmas early
Capture guidance
cards.summaryText: Diverse perspectives sharpen ethical calls before they hit crisis mode.

cards.title: Command Climate Pulse
cards.description: Use DEOCS micro-surveys to check respect, inclusion, and workload fairness metrics quarterly. Ref: DoDI 6400.11.
bulletpoints: Select DEOCS pulse
Share results transparently
Act on top findings
cards.summaryText: Ethical climates are measured, not assumed.

cards.title: Integrity First Story Bank
cards.description: Collect real stories from your unit that illustrate Integrity First and share them during hail & farewell events. Ref: AF Core Values Handbook.
bulletpoints: Interview teammates
Gain release approval
Share during formations
cards.summaryText: Stories make ethics tangible for new Guardians.

cards.title: Ethical Decision Log
cards.description: Maintain a log of high-stakes decisions noting context, stakeholders, and principles applied. Ref: AFDP 1-1.
bulletpoints: Capture date/context
List consulted advisors
Record outcome
cards.summaryText: Logs aid transparency and accelerate learning for successors.

cards.title: Ethics Scenario Sandbox
cards.description: Use tabletop scenarios blending operational urgency with ethical tension; grade using AFI 1-1 checklists. Ref: OTS Capstone.
bulletpoints: Script scenario
Facilitate discussion
Summarize lessons
cards.summaryText: Tabletops inoculate leaders before the real dilemma arrives.

space_force_microgravity_readiness_vesti.name: Vestibular Adaptation Drills
space_force_microgravity_readiness_vesti.description: Microgravity conditioning routines blending vestibular resets, suit ops, and cognitive steadiness for long-duration crews.

cards.title: Omni-Axis Spin Ups
cards.description: Run multi-axis chair sequences with eyes-open and eyes-closed reps to recalibrate otolith response before EVA blocks.
bulletpoints: Increase RPM every 30 seconds
Alternate visual fixation points
Log nausea/imbalance recovery time
cards.summaryText: Fast vestibular recovery keeps Guardians useful after every tumble.

cards.title: Suit Don/Doff Timed Drill
cards.description: Execute full restraint suit don/doff cycles while floating to reinforce muscle memory when gravity cues vanish.
bulletpoints: Target sub-6 minute don time
Use buddy system for cable checks
Record pinch/discomfort points
cards.summaryText: Suit drills in microgravity stop EVA timelines from drifting.

cards.title: Glove Dexterity Circuit
cards.description: Practice fine-motor tasks in pressurized gloves while body stabilized only with thigh straps.
bulletpoints: Complete wiring mock-up
Swap miniature fasteners
Log hand fatigue cues
cards.summaryText: Guardians maintain dexterity once gloves become the new baseline.

cards.title: Cognitive Drift Check
cards.description: Run dual-task mental math and spatial recall tests immediately after spin training to monitor cognitive drift.
bulletpoints: Record baseline vs post-spin scores
Flag any drop >10%
Report to flight surgeon
cards.summaryText: Space sickness also hits cognition—track it like any other vital.

cards.title: Translation Pathways
cards.description: Navigate three-dimensional handrail courses blindfolded using only tactile cues and tether feedback.
bulletpoints: Switch between push and pull segments
Practice egress under simulated smoke
Time each path for improvement
cards.summaryText: Spatial awareness grows when you practice moving without vision cues.

cards.title: Respiratory Control Sets
cards.description: Alternate paced breathing and isometric brace drills to stabilize heart rate before high-workload EVA tasks.
bulletpoints: Inhale for 4, exhale for 6
Layer diaphragmatic tension holds
Track HRV deltas
cards.summaryText: Controlled breathing keeps vertigo from spiraling into panic.

space_force_nebula_siege_resilience_sieg.name: Siege Resilience Leadership
space_force_nebula_siege_resilience_sieg.description: Psychological endurance reps for commanders shepherding crews through weeks of degraded sensors and radiation alerts.

cards.title: Radiation Calm Brief
cards.description: Deliver a five-minute morale brief that balances honest radiation sensor data with actionable mitigation steps.
bulletpoints: Translate rads/hour into human impact
Highlight shielding measures
Assign crew roles for monitoring
cards.summaryText: Leaders own the tone when the dosimeter alarms go off.

cards.title: System Triage Board
cards.description: Prioritize subsystem recovery actions using a simple red/amber/green board everyone can see.
bulletpoints: List degraded subsystems
Assign ownership and ETA
Publish updates hourly
cards.summaryText: Visible triage boards steady crews because they can see the plan.

cards.title: Sleep Discipline Coach
cards.description: Rebuild a circadian-friendly duty roster after two weeks of constant alerts.
bulletpoints: Cap shifts at 10 hours
Schedule protected quiet periods
Track cumulative sleep debt
cards.summaryText: Morale dies when sleep debt isn't actively managed under siege.

cards.title: Degraded Comms Storytelling
cards.description: Craft a short SITREP narrative crews can repeat verbatim when sensors are blind and rumors spike.
bulletpoints: State facts, gaps, and next checks
Assign spokespersons
Reissue script each shift
cards.summaryText: Rumor control is a leadership rep when telemetry dries up.

cards.title: Contingency Mentor Circles
cards.description: Facilitate 15-minute peer circles to surface stress indicators and quick wins.
bulletpoints: Use open-ended prompts
Capture action items on whiteboard
Escalate critical issues to medics
cards.summaryText: Micro-retros keep morale from collapsing between ops briefs.

cards.title: After-Action Emotional Sweep
cards.description: Immediately after a high-stress event, lead a structured emotional sweep to normalize responses and reset focus.
bulletpoints: Acknowledge event facts
Invite crew reactions
Restate mission purpose
cards.summaryText: Commanders must clear emotional residue before the next contact report.

space_force_orbital_operations_planning_.name: Rapid Orbit Planning Cell
space_force_orbital_operations_planning_.description: Mission design sprints that force planners to produce executable orbits when threat timelines collapse.

cards.title: Ten-Minute Conjunction Plan
cards.description: Draft a maneuver response for a high-priority conjunction using only the last two TLE updates.
bulletpoints: Estimate miss distance growth
Select burn vector that preserves mission
Record DV in allocation ledger
cards.summaryText: Rapid conjunction planning is an every-shift rep, not a once-a-quarter wargame.

cards.title: Payload Priority Trade
cards.description: Run a trade study when DV is constrained: which payload gets maneuver authority and why?
bulletpoints: Rank payload contribution to SPINS
Quantify DV per option
Publish commander recommendation
cards.summaryText: Guardians need muscle memory for payload triage before the CGO asks.

cards.title: Rapid Thermal Check
cards.description: Confirm thermal limits will hold during improvised slews or prolonged eclipses driven by emergency maneuvers.
bulletpoints: Pull current beta angle
Check radiator duty cycle
Coordinate with thermal engineer
cards.summaryText: Orbital plans die when thermal limits are afterthoughts.

cards.title: SDA Timeline Compression
cards.description: Compress the SDA update timeline by 30% using automation and pre-approved report snippets.
bulletpoints: Pre-stage command templates
Automate sensor cueing
Escalate only delta changes
cards.summaryText: Fast SDA loops make rapid orbit planning credible.

cards.title: EVA Coordination Inject
cards.description: When EVA is scheduled, rehearse how rapid orbit changes impact crew safety zones and timeline.
bulletpoints: Coordinate with EVA director
Update safe corridor maps
Brief crew on abort triggers
cards.summaryText: Orbit planners must remember the humans bolted to the payload.

cards.title: Contested Spectrum Overlay
cards.description: Overlay planned burns with adversary spectrum usage to avoid coupling maneuvers with jamming spikes.
bulletpoints: Ingest intel on hostile emitters
Shift burn timing if required
File note with MST commander
cards.summaryText: Spectrum context keeps emergency burns from triggering more chaos.

space_force_orbital_tactics_command_orbi.name: Orbital Strike Package Tactics
space_force_orbital_tactics_command_orbi.description: Tactical planning reps for orchestrating multi-vector strikes, debris-field maneuvers, and synchronized effects in contested orbits.

cards.title: Multi-Axis Timing Stack
cards.description: Sequence three maneuver elements to hit a target window within ±30 seconds despite comms latency.
bulletpoints: Assign primary, secondary, tertiary roles
Account for propagation delays
Publish shared countdown markers
cards.summaryText: Multi-axis strikes fail when timing discipline slips.

cards.title: Debris Corridor Weaving
cards.description: Plan a strike path through a congested debris field using only blue-force propulsion margins.
bulletpoints: Plot keep-out volumes
Simulate plan with Monte Carlo
Allocate DV for last-second dodges
cards.summaryText: Tacticians rehearse debris weaving before combat forces them to.

cards.title: Counter-Adversary Jamming
cards.description: Build a strike comms plan that survives worst-case jamming by layering optical, RF, and store-and-forward relays.
bulletpoints: Identify vulnerable links
Design cross-domain backup
Set triggers for switching paths
cards.summaryText: No comms plan survives first contact unless you build backups into the package.

cards.title: ROE Crosswalk
cards.description: Rehearse how rules of engagement apply when maneuvers transit commercial slots or allied constellations.
bulletpoints: List legal constraints per orbit
Coordinate with commercial liaison
Update commander's critical information requirements
cards.summaryText: ROE literacy prevents tactical pauses once the package is airborne.

cards.title: Abort Tree Drill
cards.description: Construct an explicit abort tree covering comms loss, propulsion faults, and adversary counter-maneuvers.
bulletpoints: Define criteria for each abort branch
Assign authority to call aborts
Brief recovery timelines
cards.summaryText: Abort trees are tactical confidence—everyone knows the exits.

cards.title: Synchronized Fires Inject
cards.description: Integrate cyber or terrestrial fires enablers into the orbital strike package and rehearse the message flow.
bulletpoints: Identify prerequisite space effects
Align fire support timelines
Publish joint confirmation calls
cards.summaryText: Orbital tacticians must speak the fires cell language for real integration.

space_force_physical_and_resilience_ment.name: Mental Toughness
space_force_physical_and_resilience_ment.description: Guardian Resilience and IDEAL-aligned cognitive drills.

cards.title: Guardian Breathing Ladder
cards.description: Practice 4-4-4-4 box breathing, 4-7-8 downshift, and tactical breathing before and after high stakes sims. Ref: Guardian Resilience Training.
bulletpoints: Cycle 5 rounds
Note HR drop
Pair with grounding
cards.summaryText: Breathing ladders reset your nervous system in under a minute.

cards.title: Cognitive Reframing Drill
cards.description: Use the ABC (Activating event, Belief, Consequence) worksheet from the Guardian Resilience Framework to reframe stress stories. Ref: Guardian Resilience Framework.
bulletpoints: Write the event
List automatic belief
Design balanced thought
cards.summaryText: Reframing keeps setbacks from spiraling into catastrophes.

cards.title: Imagery Rehearsal
cards.description: Spend 10 minutes visualizing flawless crew execution using all five senses before check-rides. Ref: USAF MRT curriculum.
bulletpoints: Script best-case
Engage senses
Repeat daily
cards.summaryText: Imagery primes the brain to treat success as familiar.

cards.title: Stress Inoculation Sets
cards.description: Pair moderate physical exertion with technical tasks to simulate ops stress (per Guardian Resilience Field Guide).
bulletpoints: Do 2-min cardio burst
Execute console checklist
Debrief errors
cards.summaryText: Train the brain to think clearly while the body is stressed.

cards.title: Battle Buddy Check
cards.description: Adopt the Guardian Wingman script (ASK, CARE, ESCORT) monthly to normalize mental health conversations. Ref: Guardian Resilience Program.
bulletpoints: Set recurring reminders
Use ASK-CARE-ESCORT
Document referrals
cards.summaryText: Wingman checks create early off-ramps from crisis.

cards.title: Micro-Recovery Toolkit
cards.description: Build a list of five-minute resets (walk, journal, breathwork) and post near consoles per Guardian Ideal guidance.
bulletpoints: Crowdsource ideas
Post near duty desk
Model usage
cards.summaryText: Micro-resets prevent macro burnouts.

cards.title: Values-to-Action Alignment
cards.description: Review personal core values and list two weekly actions demonstrating alignment, as directed in the Guardian Ideal workbook.
bulletpoints: List top values
Plan tangible acts
Reflect on outcomes
cards.summaryText: Purpose fuels resilience when behaviors align with beliefs.

cards.title: Sleep Shield Protocol
cards.description: Execute the USAF Sleep Optimization checklist (caffeine cutoff, blue light reduction, pre-bed routine) nightly. Ref: USAF Sleep Guide.
bulletpoints: Set caffeine curfew
Dim screens
Create wind-down ritual
cards.summaryText: Sleep discipline is mental armor for Guardians.

cards.title: Mindfulness Minute
cards.description: Integrate one-minute grounding breaks (5-4-3-2-1 senses) at top of every hour on console. Ref: Guardian Resilience Program.
bulletpoints: Set hourly timer
Cycle senses
Return to task
cards.summaryText: Short mindfulness bursts maintain focus during 12-hour watches.

cards.title: After-Action Emotional Sweep
cards.description: Add an emotion check to every AAR (what did you feel, what do you need) to process stress in real time. Ref: Guardian Resilience Framework.
bulletpoints: Prompt each member
Normalize honesty
Identify resources
cards.summaryText: Feelings aired quickly rarely become morale problems.

cards.title: Peak/Recover Calendar
cards.description: Plot mission surge windows against personal life events to pre-plan support, using the Guardian Resilience Planner.
bulletpoints: Mark peak ops
Schedule family touchpoints
Arrange backup support
cards.summaryText: Proactive calendars reduce stress collisions at home and work.

cards.title: Gratitude Transmission
cards.description: Send a weekly gratitude note or voice memo to a teammate, reinforcing optimism bias rewiring. Ref: Guardian Ideal.
bulletpoints: Pick recipient
State specific impact
Share publicly when appropriate
cards.summaryText: Gratitude protects morale and strengthens teams.

space_force_physical_and_resilience_ussf.name: USSF Fitness Standards
space_force_physical_and_resilience_ussf.description: Guardian-specific conditioning aligned with DAFI 36-2905 and the USSF Fitness Programming Guide.

cards.title: 1.5-Mile Run Tier Plan
cards.description: Map pacing splits for Guardian Tiers I-III (≤9:12, ≤10:20, ≤11:30) using DAFI 36-2905 tables; log training runs weekly. Ref: DAFI 36-2905.
bulletpoints: Set target pace per tier
Schedule interval work
Record progress
cards.summaryText: Know your pacing plan before test day shows up.

cards.title: Push-Up Form Audit
cards.description: Film push-up technique vs. USSF standard (elbows lockout, 90° bend) and correct reps to meet Tier I count (≥57). Ref: USSF Fitness Guide 2024.
bulletpoints: Record from side view
Count only valid reps
Program corrective drills
cards.summaryText: Perfect reps beat extra sloppy ones every time.

cards.title: Plank Progression
cards.description: Plan weekly plank holds building to Tier I requirement (≥3:35) with anti-extension accessories. Ref: DAFI 36-2905.
bulletpoints: Baseline max hold
Add RKC/side planks
Track weekly gains
cards.summaryText: Consistency beats heroics when building core endurance.

cards.title: VO2 Max Zone-2 Block
cards.description: Schedule 2× weekly 45-minute Zone-2 sessions (65-75% HRmax) to lift VO2 for aerobic events. Ref: USSF Fitness Programming Guide.
bulletpoints: Calculate HR zones
Pick low-impact modality
Log HR + RPE
cards.summaryText: Zone-2 is the aerobic cheat code for Guardians.

cards.title: Sprint Interval Booster
cards.description: Incorporate 6×400m intervals at goal pace with 90-second rest to sharpen run speed. Ref: USSF Fitness Programming Guide.
bulletpoints: Warm up thoroughly
Hold race pace
Cool down + stretch
cards.summaryText: Intervals teach your body what test pace feels like.

cards.title: Strength Circuit Template
cards.description: Program push, pull, hinge, squat, and core moves hitting Tier I strength guardrails 2× weekly. Ref: Guardian Fitness Playbook.
bulletpoints: Use compound lifts
Balance volume
Track loads
cards.summaryText: Balanced strength keeps Guardians resilient under console hours.

cards.title: Body Composition Log
cards.description: Track waist-to-height ratio aiming ≤0.50 per USSF health standard using monthly measurements. Ref: DAFI 36-2905.
bulletpoints: Measure waist at navel
Calculate ratio
Adjust nutrition plan
cards.summaryText: Small nutrition tweaks sustain compliance year-round.

cards.title: Mobility Prep Flow
cards.description: Use the USSF dynamic mobility series pre-testing (leg swings, inchworms, thoracic rotations) to reduce injury risk. Ref: USSF Fitness Guide.
bulletpoints: Perform sequence daily
Focus on hips/spine
Pair with light cardio
cards.summaryText: Mobile joints fuel faster times and cleaner reps.

cards.title: Recovery Protocol
cards.description: Plan weekly recovery inputs (sleep ≥7 hrs, hydration 0.7 oz/lb, periodic deload) per Guardian Resilience guidance. Ref: Guardian Resilience Framework.
bulletpoints: Set sleep targets
Hydrate deliberately
Schedule deload weeks
cards.summaryText: Recovery is a standard, not an indulgence.

cards.title: Nutritional Periodization
cards.description: Align macro intake with training blocks (build, peak, taper) using USAF Registered Dietitian templates. Ref: DAF Nutrition Guide.
bulletpoints: Plan macros per block
Monitor energy levels
Adjust weekly
cards.summaryText: Fuel shifts should match training focus for predictable results.

cards.title: Heat/Altitude Acclimation
cards.description: Apply gradual exposure protocols before tests at Peterson, Buckley, or overseas locations. Ref: DAFI 48-101.
bulletpoints: Increase load 10%/day
Monitor HR + hydration
Log symptoms
cards.summaryText: Environmental prep prevents surprise DNFs.

cards.title: Diagnostic Mock Test
cards.description: Conduct a full diagnostic every 45 days, capturing event order, rest intervals, and scoring per DAFI 36-2905. Ref: DAFI 36-2905.
bulletpoints: Simulate official order
Use certified timers
Record official sheets
cards.summaryText: Diagnostics turn test day into a formality.

space_force_space_contingency_resilience.name: Contingency Anomaly Response
space_force_space_contingency_resilience.description: Mission assurance checklists for leading crews through cascading anomalies, degraded comms, and prolonged isolation.

cards.title: Fault Isolation Sprint
cards.description: Run a ten-minute drill to isolate primary vs. secondary fault indications using cross-sensor validation.
bulletpoints: List affected subsystems
Check redundant sensor truth
Publish isolation hypothesis
cards.summaryText: Fast fault isolation keeps the crew ahead of cascading alarms.

cards.title: Command Authority Tag-Up
cards.description: Confirm who holds tactical command when primary controllers drop offline.
bulletpoints: Review command succession
Distribute alternate crypto
Notify higher headquarters
cards.summaryText: Authority ambiguity is a bigger risk than the anomaly itself.

cards.title: Anomaly Battle Drill
cards.description: Execute the standardized anomaly checklist start-to-finish with timers to ensure muscle memory holds.
bulletpoints: Start clock on initial alert
Log comms to engineering
Close out with lessons learned
cards.summaryText: Battle drills only work when performed under a clock.

cards.title: Isolation Communications Plan
cards.description: Draft a micro-brief the crew can transmit blindly when contact with higher is intermittent.
bulletpoints: Include status, needs, next action
Cap message at 30 seconds
Practice on backup radios
cards.summaryText: Isolation briefs keep trust intact even with patchy comms.

cards.title: Logistics Sustainment Check
cards.description: Inventory consumables and reforecast endurance every 24 hours during long contingencies.
bulletpoints: Update water/oxygen/fuel levels
Flag reorder thresholds
Share status with morale officer
cards.summaryText: Contingency calm relies on a transparent sustainment picture.

cards.title: Reconstitution Handoff
cards.description: Write the reconstitution handoff package while the anomaly is still ongoing so relief crews can take over instantly.
bulletpoints: Capture current system status
List incomplete actions
Attach sensor data snapshots
cards.summaryText: Great commanders write the next crew's playbook before they arrive.

space_force_space_operations_orbital_mec.name: Orbital Mechanics
space_force_space_operations_orbital_mec.description: Core orbital design drills Guardians revisit before clearing any maneuver plan.

cards.title: Kepler Laws Mission Checks
cards.description: Re-derive how Kepler's three laws bound period, velocity envelopes, and swept area before every mission design review to keep truth data within AFSCN tolerances. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Confirm T^2 ∝ a^3 for each semimajor axis
Track equal-areas timing to predict burn arcs
Bind eccentricity-driven perigee risk
cards.summaryText: Refresh Kepler fundamentals so maneuver math stays honest before it hits the ATO queue.

cards.title: TLE to State Vector Drill
cards.description: Practice parsing both TLE lines into ECI state vectors, validating BSTAR drag terms and epoch staleness before uplinking new ephemerides. Ref: AFTTP 3-1.Space.
bulletpoints: Decode mean motion and inclination
Propagate to scenario epoch with SGP4
Flag TLEs older than 24 hours
cards.summaryText: Turn raw TLEs into actionable state vectors without waiting on another analyst shift.

cards.title: Hohmann Window Timing
cards.description: Compute optimal phase angles, DV splits, and burn sequencing for standard LEO-GEO transfers while tracking plane-change penalties. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Solve for transfer semi-major axis
Allocate DV between perigee/apogee burns
Record total DV in mission ledger
cards.summaryText: Guardians rehearse Hohmann math so transfer briefs withstand delta-V scrutiny.

cards.title: Bi-Elliptic Trade Study
cards.description: Compare bi-elliptic and classic Hohmann maneuvers for large apogee changes, capturing DV, timeline creep, and thermal dwell impacts. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Plot DV vs. apogee multiplier
Assess eclipse exposure at coast
Brief commander on fuel savings
cards.summaryText: Know when a bi-elliptic arc actually buys DV margin for the Delta.

cards.title: RAAN Drift Management
cards.description: Model J2-driven RAAN drift rates versus mission revisit needs so you can schedule burns that stay synced with CSpOC-maintained reference planes. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Compute drift using J2 term
Cross-check revisit timelines
Schedule burns inside duty cycle
cards.summaryText: Stay ahead of RAAN drift so your plane doesn't drift out of the supported SPINS.

cards.title: GEO Station-Keeping Budget
cards.description: Break out annual north-south, east-west, and momentum unload allocations per SITREP to defend fuel planning across the sustainment horizon. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: List DV allocations by axis
Tie burns to eclipse season
Update prop remaining chart
cards.summaryText: Sustain GEO slots by proving every meter-per-second in the burn plan.

cards.title: Molniya Orbit Design
cards.description: Size Molniya inclination, argument of perigee, and dwell times to guarantee northern hemisphere coverage while respecting radiation limits. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Lock inclination near 63.4°
Set ω to anchor apogee dwell
Verify dwell ≥ 8 hours
cards.summaryText: Shape Molniya profiles so polar customers keep persistent look angles.

cards.title: Rendezvous Phasing Math
cards.description: Use Clohessy–Wiltshire equations to time phasing loops, closing rates, and keep-out spheres before any proximity operation brief. Ref: AFTTP 3-1.Space.
bulletpoints: Convert range to in-plane phase
Set closure under 0.1 m/s
Respect 1 km keep-out shell
cards.summaryText: Master CW math so your RPO plan hits the stack ready for approval.

cards.title: Launch Window Geometry
cards.description: Calculate daily launch windows by aligning Earth rotation, target RAAN, and phasing constraints to avoid wasted countdown cycles. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Project target ground track
Solve sidereal offset
Publish window with pad chief
cards.summaryText: Tune launch windows so range, weather, and orbital planes all sync up.

cards.title: Differential Drag Steering
cards.description: Plan attitude profiles that modulate drag area for passive phasing or separation, coordinating with thermal and power teams. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Estimate Cd*A impacts
Protect battery sun angles
Coord with SDA cell
cards.summaryText: Use drag like a control surface without violating subsystem red lines.

cards.title: End-of-Life Disposal
cards.description: Validate graveyard boosts or controlled re-entry plans to comply with national debris standards before decommissioning. Ref: Space Policy Directive-3.
bulletpoints: Confirm 300 km graveyard raise
Check 25-year rule
Capture delta-V & prop left
cards.summaryText: Close out missions with debris-compliant maneuvers Guardians can defend.

cards.title: Conjunction Avoidance Math
cards.description: Rehearse probability of collision (Pc) calculations, miss distance projections, and burn box construction before each daily CSpOC sync. Ref: SPD-3.
bulletpoints: Translate CDMs quickly
Set gimbaled burn boxes
Document Pc thresholds
cards.summaryText: Turn CDMs into maneuver decisions without delaying the supported commander.

space_force_space_operations_satellite_s.name: Satellite Systems
space_force_space_operations_satellite_s.description: Bus, payload, and TT&C refreshers tied to current Delta sustainment orders.

cards.title: Bus vs Payload Power Budget
cards.description: Reconcile battery depth-of-discharge ceilings with payload duty cycles so commanding honors EPS red lines documented in AFSPCMAN 91-710. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Map payload peak draw
Check DOD% during eclipse
Approve cutback table
cards.summaryText: Guardians keep payload plans inside the published power profile every time.

cards.title: ADCS Momentum Dump Matrix
cards.description: Validate attitude control momentum wheels against sensor tasking, identifying when thruster unloads must be scheduled with SDA coordination. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Trend wheel momentum
Protect star tracker FOV
Pre-coordinate unload burns
cards.summaryText: Prevent surprise unloads by trending ADCS momentum daily.

cards.title: Thermal Balance Audit
cards.description: Cross-check hot and cold case configuration limits before commanding payload heaters or solar array slews during eclipse season. Ref: AFI 91-217.
bulletpoints: Review thermal node limits
Confirm heater deadbands
Coordinate with payload ops
cards.summaryText: No thermal surprises when the eclipse season hits if you rehearse the limits now.

cards.title: Protected SATCOM Crosslinks
cards.description: Practice configuring crosslink schedules, crypto loads, and beam shaping for AEHF or WGS payloads per CJCSI 6250.01. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Load updated TRANSEC keys
Assign crosslink slots
Document beam priority
cards.summaryText: Crosslink settings stay aligned with DISA tasking when Guardians rehearse the workflow.

cards.title: GPS Block III Modernization
cards.description: Track L1C/L2C payload availability, M-code power settings, and NAVSTAR control segments so users get accurate NAVWAR reporting. Ref: AFCSM 11-2GPS.
bulletpoints: Map signal set per SV
Review URE scores
Coordinate with 2 SOPS
cards.summaryText: Keep GPS modernization notes sharp to defend NAVWAR readiness reports.

cards.title: TT&C Link Margin Walk
cards.description: Calculate uplink/downlink Eb/N0, antenna pointing loss, and weather fade margins before scheduling commanding passes. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Baseline antenna gain
Apply rain fade curves
Record final link margin
cards.summaryText: Validate TT&C links numerically so command windows aren't gambles.

cards.title: On-Orbit Cyber Hardening
cards.description: Review secure command authentication, crypto period changes, and FIPS 140-3 module status before each crew turnover. Ref: DoDI 8530.01.
bulletpoints: Verify dual-factor commanding
Rotate crypto per FRAGO
Inspect audit logs
cards.summaryText: Treat satellites like weapon systems by enforcing cyber hygiene every shift.

cards.title: Contingency Safe Modes
cards.description: Rehearse transition steps for safe-hold, including sun-pointing attitudes, transmitter inhibits, and telemetry subset availability. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Identify safe-hold triggers
Know telemetry subset
Pre-plan recovery steps
cards.summaryText: When busses tumble, only rehearsed crews recover them fast.

cards.title: Payload Calibration Cadence
cards.description: Plan calibration events, ground truth comparisons, and data quality flags so ISR customers trust your product lines. Ref: AFDP 2-0.
bulletpoints: Schedule star or moon cals
Capture ground truth sets
Publish quality KPIs
cards.summaryText: Cal plans keep payload credibility high with every intel customer.

cards.title: Redundant Chain Switchover
cards.description: Step through command sequences for switching to redundant TT&C or payload chains, logging verification telemetry. Ref: AFSPCI 10-1204.
bulletpoints: Verify cross-strap health
Execute swap in sandbox
Capture signature telemetry
cards.summaryText: Practice redundant chain swaps before the anomaly makes it mandatory.

cards.title: Degradation Reporting Battle Drill
cards.description: Align anomaly logs, mission impact assessments, and MAJCOM reporting templates so leadership decisions stay fast. Ref: AFMAN 91-223.
bulletpoints: Log subsystem symptoms
Tie to supported mission
Notify CSpOC per SOP
cards.summaryText: Anomalies only stay small when reporting muscle memory is strong.

cards.title: Configuration Control Review
cards.description: Walk through every active command plan, pending script, and inhibit tag before releasing the weekly ops summary. Ref: AFI 63-125.
bulletpoints: Compare plan vs. executed
Verify inhibit trackers
Gain chief engineer approval
cards.summaryText: Clear configs mean fewer unforced errors on console.

space_force_space_operations_space_domai.name: Space Domain Awareness
space_force_space_operations_space_domai.description: SDA battle drills tying sensors, data fusion, and commander updates together.

cards.title: CSpOC Conjunction Workflow
cards.description: Rehearse the 72/48/24-hour conjunction warning process, including CDM parsing, risk assessment, and commander recommendation templates. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Decode miss distance components
Map Pc thresholds
Deliver 3 options + timeline
cards.summaryText: Own the conjunction workflow so commanders get timely maneuver calls.

cards.title: Sensor Tasking Matrix
cards.description: Build prioritized sensor tasking for GSSAP, SBSS, GEODSS, and allied telescopes, balancing custody gaps with weather and maintenance windows. Ref: AFI 14-133.
bulletpoints: List gaps by orbital regime
Assign best sensor per pass
Publish handover notes
cards.summaryText: Task SDA sensors like a maestro so no object falls out of custody.

cards.title: Custody Confidence Metrics
cards.description: Calculate Track ID quality, covariance growth, and observation age to justify custody status in the Space Order of Battle. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Trend covariance ellipsoids
Capture observation recency
Flag degraded custody
cards.summaryText: Quantify SDA custody instead of relying on gut feel.

cards.title: Threat Characterization Drill
cards.description: Fuse signatures, maneuver history, and intel cues to categorize potential adversary RPO behavior within the Joint Space Tasking Order. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Compare ΔV history
Assess payload signature
Recommend threat tier
cards.summaryText: Translate SDA tracks into threat calls the JSpOC can act on.

cards.title: Catalog Maintenance Battle Drill
cards.description: Execute add/change/delete actions with 18 SDS ensuring orbital elements and owner data stay authoritative. Ref: AFMAN 14-117.
bulletpoints: Submit precise reason codes
Sync with allied catalogs
Audit after-action report
cards.summaryText: A pristine catalog underpins every SDA decision.

cards.title: Blue Force Tracking Updates
cards.description: Verify friendly object ephemerides, statuses, and asset tags before each Space Tasking Order release. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Scrub friendly custody stats
Resolve mismatched tags
Push updates to STO
cards.summaryText: Keep blue force space tracks clean so targeting stays deconflicted.

cards.title: Battle Management Cell Sync
cards.description: Practice condensing SDA picture for the Space Battle Management Cell, highlighting threats, mitigation options, and risk to mission. Ref: SDP 3-0.
bulletpoints: Summarize top threats
Match mitigation COAs
State residual risk
cards.summaryText: Deliver crisp SDA updates that commanders can trust in the fight.

cards.title: Coalition Data Exchange
cards.description: Review SSA sharing agreements, releasability markings, and allied sensor data pipelines before joint events. Ref: Combined Space Ops Vision 2031.
bulletpoints: Tag releasable objects
Sync classification guides
Log data transfer latency
cards.summaryText: Protect sources while still delivering SDA clarity to partners.

cards.title: Space Event Debrief Template
cards.description: Build after-action packages that capture timeline, sensor data, COAs, and lessons learned after any significant SDA event. Ref: AFI 90-1601.
bulletpoints: Record event timeline
Archive supporting data
List TTP refinements
cards.summaryText: Debriefs turn single events into better future SDA decisions.

cards.title: Spectrum Interference Correlation
cards.description: Correlate RF interference reports with orbital tracks, payload pointing, and threat libraries to confirm attribution. Ref: AFDP 3-14.
bulletpoints: Overlay spectrum + tracks
Validate time coincidence
Advise counter-action
cards.summaryText: Link jamming complaints to real objects inside minutes.

cards.title: Sensor Calibration Log
cards.description: Track calibration status for radar and optical sensors, ensuring measurement biases are removed from the catalog. Ref: AFMAN 14-117.
bulletpoints: Update bias table
Log calibration intervals
Share with 18 SDS
cards.summaryText: Calibration drift quietly wrecks custody—stay ahead of it.

cards.title: Orbital Debris Reporting
cards.description: Practice completing USSPACECOM debris notifications, including size estimate, delta-V, and risk statements. Ref: Space Track Catalog CONOPS.
bulletpoints: Capture breakup indicators
Compute debris clouds
Distribute formal notice
cards.summaryText: Rapid debris reporting keeps allies informed and assets safe.

space_force_zero_gravity_conditioning_ze.name: Zero-G Strength Block
space_force_zero_gravity_conditioning_ze.description: Core, grip, and proprioception sessions tailored for crews living without a deck under their feet.

cards.title: Elastic Core Triads
cards.description: Perform plank, anti-rotation, and leg-raise holds using resistance loops anchored to the module walls.
bulletpoints: Hold each position 45 seconds
Alternate breathing tempos
Log perceived exertion
cards.summaryText: Cores keep posture honest when gravity is gone.

cards.title: Grip Endurance Ladder
cards.description: Cycle through increasing-duration grip squeezes while translating across handrails.
bulletpoints: Use hand dynamometer for baseline
Add finger extensor bands
Cooldown with forearm massage
cards.summaryText: Grip endurance is the first thing to fade without gravity.

cards.title: Lower-Body Tether Presses
cards.description: Anchor boots to resistance platform and execute controlled squats and lunges to maintain bone loading.
bulletpoints: Target 3 sets of 12 reps
Keep spine neutral
Log joint discomfort
cards.summaryText: Lower-body loading preserves bone density through long deployments.

cards.title: Spatial Orientation Maze
cards.description: Navigate a 3D maze of labeled targets while rotating your body frame 90° each segment.
bulletpoints: Time each lap
Call out orientation cues
Switch leading hand every lap
cards.summaryText: Mobility plus cognition equals low-error movement in zero-G.

cards.title: Breathing Under Load
cards.description: Pair resistance work with paced breathing to maintain oxygen efficiency.
bulletpoints: Use 4-2-4-2 breathing cadence
Monitor pulse ox
Log dizziness events
cards.summaryText: Breath discipline keeps strength work sustainable in microgravity.

cards.title: Neuromuscular Reaction Drills
cards.description: Catch and redirect velcro cubes launched from random vectors to train reaction speed.
bulletpoints: Vary cube mass
Track catch success rate
Progress to dual-cube drills
cards.summaryText: Reaction drills keep hands fast when floating chaos hits.
